_comment: REGENERATED identity-sweep fixture (U2 partial, JD-4/JD-9/ED-PC-0009, 2026-07-08): weapon_physics.percussion_authority's non-blunt self-gate now routes to reversed_grip_percussion (the grounded Mordhau option) instead of a hard 0.0 -- moves percussion_authority/puncture_pressure for every hands==2 bladed weapon (0.0 unchanged for hands==1/hafted weapons). geometry.cut_factor/thrust_factor's floor-drop fixes are NOT independently visible in this fixture (nothing here reads geo['cut']/geo['thrust'] directly; element_afforded's cut_thrust branch now reads geo['thrust'] instead of geo['gap'] internally, but that's a systems.py-level effect this fixture doesn't cover). Lengths in METRES. Compared at 1e-9 by test_combat_units_refactor.py.
